briefdescription.para: Property: A name for this event template or instance.

detaileddescription.para: This property allows setting and getting a custom name for the event, which can be helpful in identifying or labeling events in complex analyses.

briefdescription.para: Property: A hash string that may identify the configuration or source of this event.

detaileddescription.para: This property stores a hash value typically used to uniquely identify the event or its configuration. This can be useful for caching or cross-referencing.

briefdescription.para: Property: The primary TTree name for this event.

detaileddescription.para: This property stores the name of the main TTree from which this event originates. This is particularly relevant when working with ROOT files containing multiple TTrees.

briefdescription.para: Property: The event weight used for normalization or scaling.

detaileddescription.para: This property stores the event weight, which is typically used for normalization, cross-section adjustments, or other physics-based scalings.

briefdescription.para: Property: The event index or entry number in the source TTree.

detaileddescription.para: This property stores the position or index of the event within the source data, which is useful for tracing or identifying individual events.

briefdescription.para: Property: List of TLeaf names (variables) to read for this event.

detaileddescription.para: This property stores the names of all variables or data fields that should be extracted and made available from the raw data for this event.

briefdescription.para: Internal map for storing tree name mappings or aliases.

detaileddescription.para: This map connects logical tree names (used as keys in the analysis) with their actual names in the ROOT files. Map of tree name aliases.

briefdescription.para: Internal map for storing branch name mappings or aliases.

detaileddescription.para: Map of branch name aliases.

briefdescription.para: Internal map for storing leaf name mappings or aliases.

detaileddescription.para: Map of leaf name aliases.

briefdescription.para: Map of registered particles by type and name.
Map of particle generator functions by type.
Pointer to event metadata.
Source filename for this event.
Internal event data structure.
Creates a new event template instance.

detaileddescription.para: Creates a copy of the current event_template object.

Pointer to the newly created event_template object.
Factory method that creates and returns a new instance of the event_template class. Useful for creating derived class instances in a polymorphic context.

Pointer to the newly created event_template object
This method creates a new instance of the event_template class, copying the current object's state into the new instance.

briefdescription.para: Builds an event data structure from an element.

detaileddescription.para: Empty implementation of the build method (to be overridden in derived classes).

el
Pointer to an element_t structure containing raw event data.
Virtual method that processes raw element data to build the event structure. This method is typically overridden in derived classes to handle specific event formats.

ele
Pointer to an element_t structure
This is a placeholder method that derived classes are expected to override with their specific event building logic.

briefdescription.para: Resets the event template to its initial state.

detaileddescription.para: Clears all event data and prepares the template for new event processing.

briefdescription.para: Initializes the event template with necessary settings.

detaileddescription.para: Sets up internal data structures and configurations. This method should be called before performing other operations on the template.

briefdescription.para: Builds an event from raw data.

detaileddescription.para: Virtual method that processes raw data to create a structured event representation. This base method delegates implementation to the overloaded build(element_t*) method.

briefdescription.para: Builds a mapping between event data structures and handlers.

detaileddescription.para: Builds a mapping between event data and tree/branch structures.

evnt
Pointer to a map associating strings with data_t pointers.
Creates relationships between the event's trees, branches, leaves and their corresponding data handlers to facilitate data access and manipulation.

evnt
Map of data pointers keyed by name
Creates internal mapping between the data containers and the logical tree/branch/leaf structure used in physics analysis.

briefdescription.para: Clears all leaf string references.

detaileddescription.para: Resets internal collections of trees, branches, and leaves. This is useful when preparing to process a new event format.

briefdescription.para: Registers a particle for tracking in this event.

parameterdescription.para: The name that identifies this particle type (e.g., "Electron").
The branch prefix for this particle collection (e.g., "el_").

briefdescription.para: Adds a tree to the event structure.

parameterdescription.para: The primary key or name for this tree.
The specific tree name if different from key, or an alias.

briefdescription.para: Adds a branch to the event structure.

parameterdescription.para: The primary key or name for this branch (e.g., "el_").
The specific branch name if different from key, or an alias.

briefdescription.para: Adds a leaf (variable) to the event structure.

detaileddescription.para: Adds a leaf to the event template.

parameterdescription.para: The primary key or name for this leaf (e.g., "met_et").
The specific leaf name if different from key, or an alias.
The key name for the leaf.
The value for the leaf (defaults to key if empty).

briefdescription.para: Splits a string into a vector of substrings based on a delimiter.

parameterdescription.para: The input string to split.
The delimiter.

briefdescription.para: Removes whitespace from the beginning and end of a string.

parameterdescription.para: The string to trim.

briefdescription.para: Gets the type name of a variable as a string (for debugging).

parameterdescription.para: The type to get the name of.

simplesect.para: The name of the type as a string.

inbodydescription.para: < Gets the type name via RTTI.
< Returns the type name.

briefdescription.para: Sums the elements of a vector.

parameterdescription.para: The type of elements in the vector.
Pointer to the vector to sum.

inbodydescription.para: < Initialize the output variable.
< Return the sum.

briefdescription.para: Static setter for the name property.

detaileddescription.para: Sets the name for the event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a string containing the name.
Pointer to the event_template instance.
Pointer to the name.
Pointer to the event template.

briefdescription.para: Static setter for the hash property.

detaileddescription.para: Sets the hash for the event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a string containing the hash.
Pointer to the event_template instance.
Pointer to the path used for hashing.
Pointer to the event template.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the tree property.

detaileddescription.para: Gets the tree name from the event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a string to store the tree name.
Pointer to the event_template instance.
Pointer to store the tree name.
Pointer to the event template.

briefdescription.para: Static setter for the weight property.

detaileddescription.para: Sets the weight for the event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a double containing the weight value.
Pointer to the event_template instance.
Pointer to the weight value.
Pointer to the event template.

briefdescription.para: Static setter for the index property.

detaileddescription.para: Sets the index for the event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a long containing the index value.
Pointer to the event_template instance.
Pointer to the index value.
Pointer to the event template.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the leaves property.

detaileddescription.para: Gets all leaves from the event template.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a vector of strings to store the leaf names.
Pointer to the event_template instance.
Vector to store leaf names.
Pointer to the event template.

briefdescription.para: Creates a directory path, including parent directories if needed.

parameterdescription.para: The directory path to create.

briefdescription.para: Deletes a directory path and its contents.

parameterdescription.para: The directory path to delete.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a path refers to an existing file.

parameterdescription.para: The path to check.

simplesect.para: True if the path is a file and exists, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Renames a file or directory.

parameterdescription.para: The original path.
The new path.

briefdescription.para: Converts a relative path to an absolute path.

parameterdescription.para: The path to convert.

simplesect.para: The absolute version of the path.

briefdescription.para: Lists files in a directory, optionally filtered by extension.

parameterdescription.para: The directory to search.
File extension filter. If empty, all files are listed.

simplesect.para: A vector of filenames in the directory.

briefdescription.para: Converts a double value to a string with standard precision.

parameterdescription.para: The double value to convert.

simplesect.para: The string representation of the value.

briefdescription.para: Converts a double value to a string with specified precision.

parameterdescription.para: The double value to convert.
The number of decimal places to consider.

simplesect.para: The string representation of the value.

briefdescription.para: Replaces all occurrences of a substring in a string.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the string to modify.
The substring to replace.
The replacement string.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a string contains a specific substring.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the string to check.
The substring to search for.

simplesect.para: True if the substring is found, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a string ends with a specific substring.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the string to check.
The substring to check for at the end.

simplesect.para: True if the string ends with the substring, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a vector of strings contains a specific string.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the vector to search.
The string to search for.

simplesect.para: True if the string is found in the vector, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Empties a vector and all objects it points to.

parameterdescription.para: The type of pointers in the vector.
Pointer to the vector to empty.

inbodydescription.para: < Loop through all elements in the vector.
< Delete the object the pointer points to.
< Set the pointer to nullptr to avoid dangling pointers.
< Clear the vector.

briefdescription.para: Fills a vector with pointers from another vector based on a selection index.

parameterdescription.para: The type of objects being pointed to.
Pointer to the output vector to fill.
Pointer to the source vector to select from.
Pointer to a vector of indices for selection.

inbodydescription.para: < Clear the output vector.
< Reserve space for the output elements.
< Loop through each selected index.
< Get the object at the selected index.
< Add it to the output vector.
< Mark the object as in use.

briefdescription.para: Extracts a specific property from a vector of objects into a new vector.

parameterdescription.para: The type of objects in the source vector.
The type of the property to extract.
Pointer to the output vector to fill with property values.
Pointer to the source vector of objects.
Function pointer to extract the property from an object.

inbodydescription.para: < Clear the properties vector.
< Reserve space for the property values.
< Loop through each object in the source vector.
< Create a default-initialized property variable.
< Call the provided function to extract the property.
< Add the property value to the output vector.
